music.name: Slander w/ Space Laces, Taiki Nulight, VCTRE, Nejvex (Night 1)
music.why: Two-night bass music takeover of a 7,000-cap civic hall — the biggest EDM weekend in SF this month
music.summary: Slander headlines Night 1 of their bass music residency at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium with Space Laces, Taiki Nulight, VCTRE, and Nejvex, Friday July 10, 8pm, $110+. 21+.

music.name: Slander w/ Space Laces, Taiki Nulight, VCTRE, Nejvex (Night 2)
music.why: Second night of SF's biggest bass-music weekend — Bill Graham, night two, different energy from Night 1
music.summary: Slander headlines Night 2 at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium with Space Laces, Taiki Nulight, VCTRE, and Nejvex, Saturday July 11, 8pm, $110. Large-venue bass music.

music.name: Throttle: Marie Vaunt
music.why: 636 RA interested — SF's beloved Bay Area techno party series with low-ticket warning already active
music.summary: Throttle presents Marie Vaunt headlining 1015 Folsom with Max Gardner b2b Adra, Youngmin Joo, and others on Friday July 10, 10pm–3am, 21+, $17–28.

music.name: Anjunadeep Open Air Bay Area
music.why: Anjunadeep's trademark melodic-techno sound in a daytime outdoor venue — label showcase, not a festival
music.summary: Anjunadeep Open Air Bay Area at The Ruins in American Canyon, Saturday July 11, 3–10pm, $60–125. Daytime progressive house and melodic techno outdoor show.

music.name: Louie Vega, David Harness, Kana Hishya
music.why: Louie Vega is a house music legend — this caliber of headliner rarely plays a 500-cap SF club
music.summary: Masters at Work co-founder Louie Vega headlines with David Harness and Kana Hishya at Public Works SF, Friday July 10, 9:30pm–2:30am, $32–43.

music.name: Stern Grove Festival: SF Symphony with Béla Fleck
music.address: 19th Ave & Sloat Blvd, San Francisco, CA 94132
music.why: SF Symphony performs free in a forested outdoor amphitheater with banjo legend Béla Fleck — bring a blanket
music.summary: The Stern Grove Festival presents the SF Symphony with Béla Fleck at the free outdoor Stern Grove amphitheater, Sunday July 12, 2pm. No tickets required.

music.name: Anjunadeep Bay Area Official After-Party
music.why: The late-night landing after Anjunadeep's open-air — two rooms, one ticket, deep house till late
music.summary: The official after-party to Anjunadeep's Bay Area open-air (The Ruins), taking over both floors of Audio and the new Bella lounge in SoMa on Saturday July 11 — one ticket covers both venues — with Because of Art, Leaving Laurel, Marsh, Pixxie and Rezident on melodic and deep house; 21+.

music.name: Death Guild
music.why: World's longest-running weekly goth night, cheap door, 18+, two rooms all night
music.summary: Death Guild is the world's oldest weekly goth/industrial dance night. Six DJs in two rooms play gothic, industrial, synthpop, noise, and ambient every Monday at DNA Lounge, 9:30pm–2:30am, 18+.

music.name: Four Tet – There Is Love In You (Envelop Immersive Dancing)
music.why: Dancing session not just listening — Envelop's interactive spatial-audio format for an IDM classic
music.summary: Envelop SF presents an immersive spatial-audio dancing session with Four Tet's There Is Love In You at The Midway, two showings at 2:30pm and 4:30pm on Sunday July 12.

music.name: R3hab
music.why: Global-scale EDM DJ at a mid-size SF club — more accessible and cheaper than an arena show
music.summary: International EDM and progressive-house DJ R3hab plays The Midway SF on Friday July 10, 9pm–2am, $31–37.

music.name: Radiohead – In Rainbows (Envelop Immersive Listening)
music.why: In Rainbows in spatial audio — the emotional weight of the record amplified by the room
music.summary: Envelop SF presents an immersive spatial-audio listening of Radiohead's In Rainbows at The Midway, two showings at 7:30pm and 9:30pm on Thursday July 9.

music.name: Momentum: Shredded ft Cutdwn
music.why: Fresh off EDC, Florida's Cutdwn brings hard bass and hardcore energy to a small underground venue
music.summary: Momentum presents Cutdwn — fresh off an EDC set — with SNAQ at F8 on Folsom, Friday July 10, 9pm–3am, $11–23. Techno and hardcore underground night.

music.name: BIIANCO
music.why: Techno headliner on a Thursday night at 1015 — 21+ late-night with table reservations available
music.summary: BIIANCO headlines a techno night at 1015 Folsom presented by DJ Dials, Thursday July 9, 9pm–3am, 21+, $22–31.

music.name: Baum live at Eria
music.why: Waterfront Sausalito luxury venue — live electronic set with bay views at sunset, intimate capacity
music.summary: Brazilian electronic artist Baum plays live at Eria, a boutique event space in Sausalito at 562 Bridgeway, Wednesday July 8, 7–11pm. $28.

music.name: Boards of Canada – Inferno (Envelop Immersive Listening)
music.why: Rare chance to hear an IDM classic in spatial audio — not a DJ set, a focused listening ritual
music.summary: Envelop SF presents an immersive spatial-audio listening of Boards of Canada's Inferno at The Midway, two showings at 7:30pm and 9:30pm on Wednesday July 8.

music.name: Bushbaby
music.why: Garage-house imports to 1015's main floor on a Thursday — overseas selector in a club-size room
music.summary: Bushbaby plays garage and house at 1015 Folsom on Thursday July 9, 9pm, $26. A club-focused night on the main floor of one of SF's largest clubs.

music.name: Club Drake
music.why: All-Drake all-night DJ set — the rare themed tribute night at DNA for hip-hop fans, 18+
music.summary: Club Drake at DNA Lounge: a full night of Drake hits, mashups, R&B, and club edits, Friday July 10, 9:30pm–2:30am, 18+, $10–22.

music.name: Conan The Barbarian: Screening + Dance Party
music.why: 1982 cult film plus dungeon-synth dance party after — costume contest, barbarian theme, $15 in
music.summary: Cyberdelia presents the 1982 Conan the Barbarian film screening followed by a dungeon-synth and metal dance party at DNA Lounge, Sunday July 12, doors 7:30pm / movie 8pm / party 10:30pm, 18+, $15–22 gen. adm.

music.name: Dale Howard, Sato, Kenny Cordeiro
music.why: Housology Records showcase at The Midway's cavernous space for just $5–15 — top tier-to-price ratio
music.summary: Boots N Cats / Housology Records presents Dale Howard, Sato, and Kenny Cordeiro at The Midway SF, Friday July 10, 9pm–2am, $5–15. Tech-house and house.

music.name: Day Party w/ Yung Singh
music.why: UK bhangra-house selector Yung Singh brings South Asian club culture to SF — rare genre representation
music.summary: Yung Singh, known for his bhangra-infused house sets, plays an afternoon day party at Audio SF on Sunday July 12, 2pm, $20–49.

music.name: Electrik Seoul: K-Pop x EDM
music.why: K-pop meets club EDM — the only K-pop dance night in SF this weekend
music.summary: Electrik Seoul: K-Pop x EDM at The Midway SF, Saturday July 11, 9pm–2am, $28. K-pop and EDM hybrid club night.

music.name: Five Finger Disco
music.why: Queer disco night in Oakland at White Horse Inn — the oldest LGBTQ+ bar in the Bay still throwing dance parties
music.summary: Five Finger Disco at White Horse Inn in Oakland, Saturday July 11, 9pm–2am, $10–17. Queer disco dance night at a historic Bay Area LGBTQ+ venue.

music.name: FRYTM presents: Ursul
music.why: Ursul Records' first-ever US showcase — live-rooted deep grooves from a tight European label crew
music.summary: FRYTM brings European label Ursul Records to The Great Northern in SF on Saturday July 11 (9pm–3am, $25–48) for the label's first-ever US showcase — headlined by Tpuse with Sagmo, Matony and Kohbain, built on live elements and deep grooves.

music.name: Grateful Dead – American Beauty (Envelop Immersive Listening)
music.why: Spatial audio listening session in the round — a concert hall experience, not a dance floor
music.summary: Envelop SF presents an immersive spatial-audio listening session of the Grateful Dead's American Beauty at The Midway, with two showings at 7:30pm and 9:30pm on Monday July 6.

music.name: Ivory (Innervisions)
music.why: Innervisions label artist bringing melodic deep house to an intimate SF warehouse-type space
music.summary: Ivory, a DJ on the Innervisions label, plays Madarae in SF on Friday July 10, 9pm–3am, $12–23. Deep house and melodic techno.

music.name: Klaudia Gawlas, Lyssn Up, Fiers
music.why: Halcyon's tight underground techno room — 21+, late-night, serious dancefloor without festival spectacle
music.summary: Klaudia Gawlas headlines with Lyssn Up and Fiers at Halcyon SF, Friday July 10, 10pm–4am, 21+, $19–30. Underground techno in a focused room.

music.name: Miles Davis – Kind of Blue (Envelop Immersive Listening)
music.why: Spatial audio deep-listen of a canonical jazz record — seated, concentrated, not background music
music.summary: Envelop SF presents an immersive spatial-audio listening session of Miles Davis's Kind of Blue at The Midway, with two showings at 7:30pm and 9:30pm on Tuesday July 7.

music.name: Mr. Black, Knives, Zesti
music.why: Mr. Black brings hard techno to Halcyon's focused room — 21+, 6-hour late-night set
music.summary: Mr. Black headlines with Knives and Zesti at Halcyon SF on Saturday July 11, 10pm–4am, 21+, $19–30. Underground techno night.

music.name: Nu Metal vs Emo (Emo Night Live & Nu-Metal Jacket)
music.why: Live tribute band battle plus DJ sets — the nostalgic format for anyone who survived the 2000s
music.summary: Nu Metal World presents a live tribute battle: Emo Night Live vs. Nu-Metal Jacket at DNA Lounge, Friday July 10, 9pm–2am, 18+, $10 advance / $20 door. Nu metal DJs in the second room all night.

music.name: Secret Psychedelica: Cancer (feat. Bamboo Forest)
music.why: 7th annual Cancer zodiac psytrance party — a scene institution with an astrological calendar tradition
music.summary: Secret Psychedelica's 7th annual Cancer psytrance party at DNA Lounge, Saturday July 11, 9pm–2am, 18+, $11–27. Bamboo Forest headlines with psytrance and drum & bass.

music.name: SF Free Folk Festival
music.address: Music Concourse, Golden Gate Park, San Francisco, CA
music.why: Free all-afternoon acoustic festival in Golden Gate Park — no ticket, bring a blanket, zero barrier
music.summary: The SF Free Folk Festival at Golden Gate Park Bandshell (Music Concourse), Saturday July 11, 12–6pm, free. A multi-act acoustic and folk festival in the park.

music.name: Star Camp Shasta
music.why: Three-day camping festival at the base of Mt. Shasta — rare Northern California outdoor spiritual-rave format
music.summary: Star Camp Shasta is a multi-day camping festival at Mt. Shasta, July 10–12, $130–170. Electronic music, outdoor setting in Northern California.

music.name: Young Franco – In the Round!
music.why: 360-degree stage setup at The Independent — electronic artist playing an arena-style intimate show
music.summary: Australian electronic DJ/producer Young Franco performs his 'In the Round' show at The Independent SF on Friday July 10, 8:30pm, $32. Disco and dance production.

music.name: Perreo Pesao + Tute
music.why: SF's reggaeton and dancehall night — rare genre in the club circuit, intimate Arcana venue
music.summary: Perreo Pesao + Tute at Arcana SF, Saturday July 11, 9:30pm, $10. Reggaeton and dancehall DJ night with Sánlo and mymy.

music.name: Lotek
music.why: All-vinyl all-night spanning house to jungle — 21+ upstairs loft, Oakland side of the bay, $10
music.summary: Lotek returns to the Elbo Room Jack London upstairs loft in Oakland, Friday July 10, 9pm–1:30am, 21+, $10 presale. All vinyl, all night: house, techno, breaks, hardcore, and jungle.

music.name: Italo Frisco
music.why: Free Wednesday residents set of italo-disco and acid house — good room, good records, no cover
music.summary: Second-Wednesday residency with residents Mo'Ski and Nino MSK spinning italo-disco and acid house at Madrone Art Bar, 9:30pm, free admission.

music.name: All Your Friends
music.why: Live-adjacent indie dance for the crowd that finds techno cold
music.summary: An indie-dance, synthpop and electro-house party at Rickshaw Stop in SF on Friday from 8pm.

music.name: Apres Mundi
music.why: Three Burning Man camps take over two warehouse rooms at The Loom — East Bay playa-family vibe till 3am
music.summary: Après Mundi is a Burning Man community celebration bringing three camps into two warehouse spaces at The Loom in Oakland on Saturday July 11, 9pm–3am — tech/progressive house across both rooms; $34–55.

music.name: Calamity Rave
music.why: Warehouse rave with secret SF location — the underground format with real address revealed at purchase
music.summary: Calamity Rave at a secret SF warehouse, Saturday July 11, 9pm–3am, $10. Underground electronic rave with undisclosed venue.

music.name: Diegointhedark
music.why: NorCal cult cloud-rap scene headliner live — all-ages DNA Lounge show with full support bill
music.summary: Diegointhedark, a Stockton-based cloud-rap artist, performs at DNA Lounge with support from Yung Frendi, Jalen Vlm, and Viyah, Thursday July 9, doors 7pm / show 7:30pm, all ages, $25 advance.

music.name: Glitter Goth
music.why: Cheap North Bay goth night for anyone up-county who won't drive to the city
music.summary: A darkwave, post-punk and deathrock night at the Arlene Francis Center in Santa Rosa on Saturday, 7–11pm.

music.name: High Fade: Twice as Nice Tour
music.why: Indie rock / funk-rock touring act on a mid-week club stage — The Independent's intimate format
music.summary: High Fade brings their Twice as Nice Tour to The Independent in SF on Wednesday July 8, doors at 8pm. Funk-rock, indie band in a 500-capacity room.

music.name: Knick
music.why: Late-night techno at Club Six, running to 4am — for the crowd that shows up after midnight
music.summary: Knick at Club Six SF, Saturday July 11, 10pm–4am, $30–60. Underground techno night in a small SoMa venue.

music.name: Lindy in the Park – Swing Dance Party
music.address: JFK Drive, Golden Gate Park, San Francisco, CA 94118
music.why: Free outdoor swing dancing in Golden Gate Park every Sunday — all levels welcome, live music sometimes
music.summary: Lindy in the Park: a free weekly swing dance party at Golden Gate Park (JFK Drive), Sunday July 12, 11am. All levels welcome, outdoors.

music.name: Mango Szn Debut Day Party
music.why: Hip-hop and R&B debut day party at The Midway — afternoon time slot, not a late-night crowd
music.summary: Mango Szn Debut Day Party at The Midway SF, Saturday July 11, 4–9pm, $26. Hip-hop and R&B daytime party.

music.name: Night Vision w/ Nail Polish & Chalk Teeth
music.why: Post-punk and darkwave dance party bridging The Great Northern's industrial aesthetic with live acts
music.summary: Night Vision presents Nail Polish and Chalk Teeth at The Great Northern SF, Friday July 10, 9pm–2am, $11. Post-punk and darkwave dance night.

music.name: PACE presents Sunday Brunch
music.why: Sunday daytime house party with brunch food and mimosas — LA selectors Lanky & Mr. Blimp headlining
music.summary: PACE presents Sunday Brunch at Veni Vidi Vici SF on Sunday July 12, 11am, $15. LA-based curators Lanky & Mr. Blimp headline with P-Rez and The Solo Twins; brunch food and cocktails available.

music.name: Pier Pressure Boat Party
music.why: Bass on the bay in daylight — a rare on-the-water set with skyline views
music.summary: A Saturday afternoon bass and house cruise departing Fisherman's Wharf, 4–7pm, spanning trap, dubstep and EDM on the water.

music.name: Shallou
music.why: Indie-electronic melodic artist live in Sunnyvale — accessible South Bay option for non-SF crowd
music.summary: Shallou plays Pure Nightclub in Sunnyvale, Saturday July 11, 10pm, $10–15. Indie-electronic and melodic electronic music in the South Bay.

music.name: When Darkness Sparkles
music.why: Techno night with sparkly-outfits encouraged — dark music and glam aesthetics at Monarch
music.summary: When Darkness Sparkles at Monarch SF on Friday July 10, 9:30pm–2am, $11–26. Techno night with a themed dress code: sparkly outfits encouraged.

music.name: Lostboyjay
music.why: Hip-hop debut at Audio SF — a new face in the rap scene making their mark at a known club
music.summary: Lostboyjay makes their Audio SF debut, supported by Emilio, on Friday July 10, 7:30pm–2am, 21+, $19.

music.name: Interzone Darkwave Tuesdays
music.why: Midweek darkwave refuge in the shadows — EBM and goth for $5 on a Tuesday
music.summary: Interzone Darkwave Tuesdays with Erinyes & Byter at F8 on Folsom, 9pm, $5. An intimate weekly club night mixing darkwave, EBM, and goth electronics.

music.name: Maja Blast: DJ CZ, Jaag, Nofi
music.why: Free house night with Bay Area legend DJ CZ — a no-cover showcase at Mothership, never a cover charge
music.summary: Maja Blast presents DJ CZ (of Surface Tension, Vague Terrain, Left Hand Path label) with Jaag and Nofi at Mothership Bar SF, Saturday July 11, 9pm–2am, free admission.

music.name: Atomic: New Darkwave / Synth-Pop / Post-Punk
music.why: South Bay's dedicated darkwave and post-punk night — rare for San Jose, worth the drive
music.summary: Atomic brings darkwave, synth-pop, and post-punk to The Ritz in San Jose on Thursday July 9, 9pm, $14. An alternative night for South Bay goth fans.

music.name: Dream Whirled
music.why: Psychedelic electronic art-party at a small Ethiopian bar — weird, intimate, and singular to SF
music.summary: Dream Whirled is a psychedelic electronic party at Club Waziema on Divisadero, Friday July 10, 8pm–2am, $34.

music.name: Fill Your Cups
music.why: Low-key underground house at 424 Haight — neighborhood club feel for $10, no spectacle needed
music.summary: Fill Your Cups house night at Underground SF on Haight, Saturday July 11, 9pm–2am, $10.

music.name: Inner Circle ft. Matt Jereza + Marky Method
music.why: Free Thursday deep-house night at an intimate SF venue — no cover, local selectors only
music.summary: Inner Circle presents Matt Jereza and Marky Method playing deep house at White Rabbit in SF, Thursday July 9, 9pm, free admission.

music.name: Summerween Rave
music.address: 599 Cesar Chavez St, San Francisco, CA 94124
music.why: Halloween-themed rave in July — costumes in summer for those who can't wait until October
music.summary: Summerween Rave at 3rd & Army in SF, Friday July 10, 10pm, $10. Halloween-themed electronic rave in mid-July.

music.name: The Outlaws Tour w/ Emorfik & Usaybflow
music.why: Bass and trap touring package at an unconventional Sacramento venue — worth the drive for fans
music.summary: The Outlaws Tour featuring Emorfik and Usaybflow at The Rink Studios in Sacramento, Saturday July 11, 9pm–1:30am, $31. Bass and trap live/DJ show.

music.name: Euphotic, Headboggle, Sean Keenan, Wizardmaster
music.why: Four experimental soloists using bones, modular synths and custom builds — genuine noise-art night
music.summary: Four experimental and noise artists — Euphotic, Headboggle, Sean Keenan, and Wizardmaster — perform at Peacock Lounge on Haight St, Thursday July 9, 7:30pm, $5–15. 21+.

sports.name: Beer City Half – Alameda (Half / 10K / 5K)
sports.why: Waterfront Alameda race with a beer festival at the finish — three distance options for one entry
sports.summary: Beer City Half at Radium Runway Waterfront Park in Alameda, Saturday July 11, 8:30am, $38. Offers half marathon, 10K, and 5K options along the Alameda waterfront, with beer festival at the finish.

sports.name: Marin Running Club: Thursday Trail Run
sports.address: 703 Tennessee Valley Rd, Mill Valley, CA 94941
sports.why: Same beloved Marin venue, second weekly run — longer distance options for more experienced runners
sports.summary: Marin Running Club Thursday trail run at Tennessee Valley Trailhead, Mill Valley, 6pm, free. Multiple pace groups with beginner and intermediate options.

sports.name: Marin Running Club: Tuesday Bunny Run
sports.address: 703 Tennessee Valley Rd, Mill Valley, CA 94941
sports.why: Scenic Marin trail run at Tennessee Valley for all paces — a beginner-welcoming weekly group
sports.summary: Marin Running Club's Tuesday Bunny Run at Tennessee Valley Trailhead in Mill Valley, 6pm, free. A weekly trail run with multiple distance options for all levels.

sports.name: Mission 5K Fun Run
sports.why: Weekly moderate-pace social run through the Mission ending at a bar — inclusive, free, community vibe
sports.summary: Mission 5K Fun Run: a free weekly group run every Monday at 6:30pm starting and ending at Teeth Bar on Mission St. Moderate pace, social and beginner-friendly.

sports.name: Oakland Beer Runners: Lake Merritt Run
sports.why: Run Lake Merritt then drink at a top California craft brewery — a perfect post-work Tuesday combo
sports.summary: Oakland Beer Runners host a free weekly run around Lake Merritt starting at Sante Adairius Oakland Arbor, Tuesday July 7, 6:30pm. Free, social, beer-optional.

sports.name: SFRRC Wednesday Fun Run in the Presidio
sports.address: 610 Old Mason St, San Francisco, CA 94129
sports.why: Free club run through the Presidio's scenic trails — San Francisco Road Runners, all paces welcome
sports.summary: San Francisco Road Runners Club weekly fun run in the Presidio, starting at Sports Basement Presidio (610 Old Mason St), Wednesday July 8, 6pm, free.

sports.name: 510 Run to Beers: Line 51 Farewell Run
sports.why: Farewell run honoring Line 51 Brewing's closure — a themed commemorative run in Oakland
sports.summary: 510 Run to Beers hosts a Line 51 Farewell Run from Line 51 Brewing Company in Oakland, Thursday July 9, 6:30pm, free. A social group run with a going-away theme.

sports.name: Battle On Larkin — 1v1 Breaking Invitational
sports.address: Larkin St & Eddy St, San Francisco, CA 94102
sports.why: Top-8 Bay breakers going 1v1 for a $300 pot on a Tenderloin street — free, outdoor, all-ages spectacle
sports.summary: Battle On Larkin is a 1v1 breaking (breakdance) invitational with the Bay's top 8 breakers competing for a $300 prize, on Larkin St (between Eddy & Turk) on Saturday July 11, 2–3pm — part of the free, outdoor Live On Larkin Street Festival.

sports.name: Berkeley Running Club: Tilden Park Trail Run
sports.why: Tilden Park trail run with an East Bay club known for big group adventures — accessible Berkeley hills
sports.summary: Berkeley Running Club hosts a weekly trail run in Tilden Park starting at Lone Oak, Tuesday July 7, 6:30pm, free.

sports.name: Fog City Run (Wednesday 5K)
sports.why: Hilly Marina/Presidio 5K every Wednesday, $5 cash — a fast weekly race with results tracked
sports.summary: Fog City Run: a weekly 5km race every Wednesday at 6:30pm starting from The Blue Light on Union St, SF. $5 cash at arrival; competitive but friendly, 5–20 runners.

sports.name: Lookin' for a Cure 5K
sports.why: Charity eye-health 5K at Stanford's Byers Eye Institute campus — flat, organized, well-supported
sports.summary: Lookin' for a Cure 5K at Byers Eye Institute at Stanford, Palo Alto, Saturday July 11, 7am, $30. Charity trail run benefiting eye disease research.

sports.name: MotoAmerica @ Laguna Seca — SF Group Ride
sports.venue: Meet: Treasure Island (ride to WeatherTech Raceway Laguna Seca)
sports.why: Ride down as a pack to catch pro Superbikes at a world-famous track — the destination is the event, not just the road
sports.summary: Group motorcycle ride from Treasure Island, SF, down through Los Gatos to WeatherTech Raceway Laguna Seca for MotoAmerica Superbike racing on Saturday July 11. Saturday race ticket around $75.

sports.name: Stars and Strides 5K/10K
sports.why: Charity 5K/10K at Discovery Meadow in San Jose — supports energy and tech sector community causes
sports.summary: Stars and Strides 5K/10K Run/Walk at Discovery Meadow in San Jose (180 Woz Way), Saturday July 11, 8am, $55. Presented by Bloom Energy and Tarana Wireless; includes kids fun run.

sports.name: TRI for FUN Triathlon #2
sports.why: Sacramento-area beginner triathlon from TBF Racing — relaxed format with duathlon option also available
sports.summary: TRI for FUN Triathlon #2 (with DU for FUN Duathlon option) at Rancho Seco Park, Herald CA, Sunday July 12, 8am, $110. Multi-distance triathlon and duathlon event from TBF Racing.

sports.name: Sawyer Camp Trail Ride (Recumbent Cyclists)
sports.address: Crystal Springs Rd & Skyline Blvd, San Mateo, CA 94401
sports.why: Recumbent-specific group ride on Sawyer Camp Trail — a niche format for a unique type of cyclist
sports.summary: Recumbent Cyclists of San Francisco group ride at Sawyer Camp Trail, Crystal Springs Rd, San Mateo, Sunday July 12, 9:45am, free. Recumbent bike focused, all welcome.
